introduction.title: Web engineer specialising in human-focused experiences

bio.title: About
bio.text: Ahoy-hoy! I'm Jack and I'm passionate about accessible UI, design systems and writing neat code, based in Manchester, UK. Coming from a background in music production, I've spent 14 years building human-focused websites and apps. I specialise in full digital experiences, including CMS and API integrations, performance optimisation and accessibility. I like films, video games, writing, reading and making music.

items.title: Farkle friend
items.text: A local farkle multiplayer dice game, made with Next.js and React. Including different game variations and alternative modes.

items.title: HOAM
items.text: A design system for the coffee brand HOAM, used in the HOAM e-commerce template
